experiences.description: Building an AI-driven driving school app that gamifies the learning experience and connects students, instructors, and parents in a smarter way. Solo-designed and developed using React Native with AI-assisted workflows (Cursor, ChatGPT, Claude).
Led product design within the Match team, improving tenant-landlord matching flows and creating AI-enhanced prototyping tools. Built custom Lovable prototyping tool using Qasa's design system.
Co-founded and led product design for a fintech SaaS platform providing smart cash flow tools to SMEs through partnerships with Swedbank and PayEx. Reached 400,000+ users.
Designed Data Saver feature for emerging markets, conducting field research in Brazilian favelas to understand data constraints. Reduced data usage to 1% through intelligent streaming design.
Modernized digital identity for one of Sweden's largest insurers, creating comprehensive cross-platform design system. Won Best App & Web 2017 award.
Online booking and travel experience redesign with AKQA Amsterdam. Wireframes, flows, and component designs for international platform.
Samsung projects with design department. Wireframing, prototyping, and UX design for consumer electronics interfaces.
Banking platform UI for ABN Amro, UniCredit, UOB Singapore, Standard Chartered. Design Systems, component libraries, Figma workflows, and themeable admin portals for financial institutions.

Design engineering consultancy specializing in AI-assisted product design, UX/UI, and frontend development for startups and enterprises. Worked with Spotify, Swedbank, Länsförsäkringar, PayEx, Qasa, KLM, and many others over 15+ years.

education.description: Advanced JavaScript and modern web development bootcamp.
Music production and sound design studies, exploring creative technology and audio.
Intensive program focused on digital design, strategy, and modern work methodologies.
